case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. JENNIFER COUDRON ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT COUDRON, JENNIFER DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-30-2018

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100040412) AS TO DEFENDANT COUDRON, JENNIFER

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUDRON, JENNIFER $4,105.10 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,399.60, SEE SCANNED DOC
